items.claim: Deonna Barbosa is a superior grappler compared to Arianna Melissano.
items.quote: who is a better grappler already, I think it's a massive problem.

items.claim: Tabatha Ricci has regressed in her ability to grind opponents against the fence.
items.quote: I'm watching her not grind the way she was in 2023-2024.

items.claim: Tabatha Ricci lacks the kinetic energy and pop in her strikes despite training with a pro boxer.
items.quote: he's got great kinetic energy behind his shots, and she just doesn't. She just doesn't have that pop.

items.claim: Fatima Kline is superior to Tabatha Ricci in the striking realm.
items.quote: In the striking realm, you got to lean Fatima Kline.

items.claim: Stewart Nickel is not proficient at holding opponents down despite having a wrestling background.
items.quote: Stewart nickel, he can wrestle a little bit, but not good at holding people down.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has regressed physically over his last two fights.
items.quote: He seemed to regress over the last two

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is not a UFC-caliber fighter.
items.quote: I think Mitch Ramirez is um not UFC caliber

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is significantly faster than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: I think Christian Leroy Duncan's twice as fast
